description: A SQL injection vulnerability in ExampleApp allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the username parameter.
Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in ExampleWidget before 2.3 allows attackers to inject arbitrary HTML or JavaScript via crafted input.
Remote code execution in ExampleServer allows unauthenticated attackers to run arbitrary commands via a buffer overflow in the network handler.
Path traversal vulnerability allows reading arbitrary files outside the web root directory through crafted URL parameters.
Improper authentication in ExampleAPI allows attackers to bypass login controls and access protected endpoints without valid credentials.
